description_long: This is a compact, modern machine gun with a matte black finish and a robust, angular design. The weapon features a prominent, perforated cylindrical suppressor attached to the barrel, suggesting integrated sound reduction. Its grip and stock are molded as a single ergonomic piece with horizontal grooves for improved handling. The magazine is a distinctive curved, translucent type, allowing visibility of the brass-colored cartridges inside. Two loose cartridges are visible near the weapon, emphasizing its ammunition type. The overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer components for the grip and stock.
description: A compact black machine gun with a perforated suppressor, curved translucent magazine, and ergonomic polymer grip and stock.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the machine gun, the perforated suppressor, and the curved translucent magazine loaded with visible cartridges.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the suppressor, the narrow width of the receiver, and the ribbed grip; two loose cartridges are visible beside the weapon.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the magazine, suppressor, and two loose cartridges on the ground, with clear details of the grip and trigger area.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the suppressor, the magazine's curvature, and the ribbed grip, with two cartridges visible beside the weapon.
attribute_stock_design: integrated polymer grip-stock with horizontal grooves
attribute_iron_sight_configuration: simple fixed front and rear iron sights
